summary: Iteration 13 - Comprehensive testing of ACEinovations premium website new features: Services mega-menu dropdown (2x2 grid with icons), enhanced ScrollSpiral, MouseGlow effects, dark mode text visibility, and Stacks page CTA button. All features working correctly.

services_mega_menu.icons: Globe, TrendingUp, Users, Map - all present via Lucide React
services_mega_menu.descriptions: Each item has title and description

dark_mode_text_visibility.labs_page: All text visible - heading color: rgb(243, 245, 247)
dark_mode_text_visibility.about_page: All text visible - heading: 'Built by engineers, for builders'

cards_with_content: The SEO Playbook for Technical Founders
Technical Debt is a Growth Problem, Not an Engineering One
Friction-Mapping: A Framework for Quantifying Technical Debt
From CI/CD to AI/CD: Autonomous Deployment Pipelines
Building a Multi-Tenant SaaS: Architecture That Scales to $10M ARR
The AI-Assisted Launch Stack: How We Build for 10x Velocity

mouse_glow.implementation: Fixed position radial-gradient divs with aria-hidden

card_hover_effects.glass_card_hover_css: Includes translateY(-4px), box-shadow with glow, border-color transition

pages_tested.home: PASS - All sections render in both light and dark mode
pages_tested.labs: PASS - Hero, 3 product cards, philosophy section
pages_tested.squads: PASS - Hero, 3 role cards, advantage section
pages_tested.stacks: PASS - Hero with CTA, 6 article cards, sidebar with 7 tools

features_verified: Services mega-menu dropdown opens as 2x2 grid with icons (Globe, TrendingUp, Users, Map), titles, and descriptions
Services dropdown has bottom bar 'Need a custom solution?' with 'Talk to us →' link that opens contact modal
Dark mode toggle works - clicking moon icon adds .dark class to HTML element
Dark mode persists via localStorage key 'ace-dark-mode'
Dark mode text visible on all pages: home, labs, squads, about, stacks
Dark mode cards have proper dark backgrounds (rgb(12, 19, 34)) and borders
'Start a Project' nav button inverts properly in dark mode (white bg, dark text)
Stacks page (/stacks) has 'Browse Articles' CTA button in hero section linking to #articles
Stacks page shows 6 blog post cards with titles, excerpts, categories, dates, read time
Stacks page sidebar shows 7 recommended tools (Vercel, Supabase, Tailwind CSS, etc.)
MouseGlow effect present with 2 radial-gradient elements
Card hover effects include translateY(-4px), glow shadow, border-color transition
critical_code_review_comments: Dark mode implementation is excellent - uses document.documentElement.classList and localStorage properly
Services mega-menu has clean 2x2 grid layout with proper spacing and hover effects
Stacks page CTA button correctly links to #articles anchor for smooth scrolling
All CSS variables properly defined for both light and dark modes in globals.css

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 5 pages working correctly in both light and dark modes

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified and working: Services mega-menu (2x2 grid with icons), dark mode toggle with localStorage persistence, dark mode text visibility on all pages, 'Start a Project' button inversion, Stacks page CTA button 'Browse Articles', ScrollSpiral with strokeWidth 1.8, MouseGlow effects, card hover effects. PostgreSQL database is working and stacks page shows 6 blog post cards. No issues found.
